prs.title: docs(readme): add per-crate READMEs and enhance wrkflw crate README
feat: add execution support for reusable workflows
prs.body:
(jobs.<id>.uses)

- Parser: make jobs.runs-on optional; add job-level uses/with/secrets for caller jobs
- Executor: resolve and run local/remote called workflows; propagate inputs/secrets; summarize results
- Docs: document feature, usage, and current limits in README
- Tests: add execution tests for local reusable workflows (success/failure)

Limits:
- Does not propagate outputs back to caller
- secrets: inherit not special-cased; use mapping
- Remote private repos not yet supported; public only
- Cycle detection for nested calls unchanged
